base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of master_tile_atlas — a tile from 1987 mega man. Master tile atlas — 1540×973 canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Master tile atlas — 1540×973 canvas; all 6 stage + 4 Wily-castle tilesets consolidated: industrial metal plates, spike-hazards, ladders, crumbling-blocks, water, ice, fire, electric-spark tiles
